Pediatric Range – Franchise Available Across AP

Pediatric Skin Care Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the pediatric skin care range across Andhra Pradesh. Crasenim Bar — a pH 5.5 Syndet Baby Bar with Glycerin, Coconut Oil, Aloe Vera, and Shea Butter — is recommended by paediatricians for daily infant bathing and sensitive or eczema-prone skin care.

👶 pH 5.5 Syndet Baby Bar ✅ WHO GMP Certified 🌿 Glycerin + Aloe + Shea Butter 🏥 Paediatrician Recommended
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Product

Crasenim Bar – Pediatric Skin Care for Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Bar — pH 5.5 Syndet Baby Bar 75g
Key Ingredients: Glycerin, Coconut Oil, Aloe Vera, Shea Butter pH: 5.5 (skin-neutral) WHO GMP Certified
Franchise Available

Indications

  • Daily bathing for newborns and infants
  • Sensitive and atopic-prone infant skin
  • Eczema-prone infant skin (mild-to-moderate)
  • Dermatologist and paediatrician-recommended skin cleansing

Why pH 5.5 Syndet?

  • Matches infant skin's natural acidic pH — maintains acid mantle
  • Syndet (synthetic detergent) is soap-free — no alkaline irritation
  • Glycerin and Shea Butter maintain skin moisture after each wash
  • Aloe Vera soothes redness and micro-irritation in sensitive skin
Franchise

Pediatric Skin Care Franchise Opportunity in AP

PCD Franchise

Baby Skin Care Territory

Excellent add-on product for franchise partners who already promote paediatric medicines. Strong paediatrician recommendation drives consistent retail and direct-purchase demand across AP.

Commission MR

Paediatrician Detailing

Promote Crasenim Bar to paediatricians and dermatologists in your AP territory. Easy to detail — strong visual appeal, clear product benefit, and paediatrician acceptance make prescription easy.

Pharmacy Stockist

Retail Counter Movement

Baby skin care products have strong retail pharmacy counter movement in AP, particularly in cities like Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, and Kakinada where paediatric healthcare utilization is high.

FAQs

Pediatric Range Franchise – FAQ

What is a Syndet Bar and how is it different from regular soap?
A Syndet (Synthetic Detergent) bar is soap-free and formulated at a controlled pH (5.5 for Crasenim Bar). Regular soaps are alkaline (pH 9–10) and can disrupt infant skin's acid mantle, leading to dryness and irritation. Syndet bars are far gentler and are the standard recommendation in paediatric dermatology for infant bathing.
Which doctors recommend Crasenim Bar?
Paediatricians and dermatologists are the primary prescribers. Paediatricians in AP routinely recommend a pH-balanced syndet bar as the first choice for newborn and infant skin care, especially for babies with dry, sensitive, or eczema-prone skin.
How do I take a pediatric range franchise in Andhra Pradesh?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 or fill the form on our Franchise page. Crasenim Bar is available as a standalone franchise product or as part of a combined product portfolio.
